title: Precision Targeting Report: gpt2-xl
findings: Adaptive threshold set at 0.062878 (p85 of variance distribution).
Identified 90 heads with both high variance and collapse events.
recommendations: Ablate top heads in the late layers to verify causal role in IOI.
Compare these signatures against pure induction tasks to ensure task-specificity.
Use the Real-Time Monitor on model outputs to catch 'elaboration pull' early.
